title: thoreochloa pallens
intro: Thoreochloa pallens is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. Thoreochloa pallens is not widely documented for medicinal properties, however, it is said to have potential health benefits when used in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with this plant are not well-documented and may include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. As Thoreochloa pallens is not widely studied, herbal preparations are not commonly available or recommended.
